name: codex-hud
description: Real-time HUD for Codex sessions, adapted from claude-hud.

interface.shortDescription: Show context, usage, tools, agents, and todos for Codex sessions.
interface.longDescription: Codex HUD ports claude-hud's terminal HUD to Codex by reading Codex rollout JSONL sessions and rendering the same context, usage, tool activity, agent, todo, git, and session metadata lines.
defaultPrompt: Set up Codex HUD for this machine.
Show my latest Codex HUD snapshot.
